info.title: Ex Libris APIs
info.description: For more information on how to use these APIs, including how to create an API key required for authentication, see [Alma REST APIs](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis).

externalDocs.description: Detailed documentation on these APIs at the Ex Libris Developer Network.

get.description: This API returns a list of all Code Tables for the configuration API.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_code_tables.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_code_tables.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

40166411 - 'Failed to find scope.'

get.description: This API returns all rows defined for a code-table.

parameters.name: codeTableName
parameters.description: Code table name.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Requested language.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Institution or Library code

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_code_table.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_code_table.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

40166411 - 'Param value is invalid.'

put.description:
This Web service updates a code-table.

It doesn't currently support restoring a row, and 'Manage in Network' functionality.

parameters.name: codeTableName
parameters.description: Code table name.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Requested language.

requestBody.description: This method takes a code-table object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_code_table.xsd?tags=PUT)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_code_table.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_code_table.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

90100 - 'Code table name is empty.'

90101 - 'Table does not exist.'

90102 - 'Requested table is hidden.'

90121 - 'Requested table scope is not legal.'

90122 - 'Multiple default codes.'

90123 - 'Requested table is not customizable'

get.description: This API returns a list of all Departments configured for the Institution.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Department type. The type DIGI (digitization) or ALL is supported. Default is ALL.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Add optional parameter view=brief to get a list of departments without operators.

parameters.name: library
parameters.description: Library code. Optional. Default: The institutional level.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_departments.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_departments.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

get.description: This web service returns a list of Deposit Profiles.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: user_group
parameters.description: An option to filter by user group. Optional. Default value: Empty String which means that all the results will be returned.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_deposit_profiles.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_deposit_profiles.xsd)

400.description: Bad Request

get.description: This web service returns a specific Deposit Profile.

parameters.name: deposit_profile_id
parameters.description: The Deposit Profile ID.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_deposit_profile.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_deposit_profile.xsd)

400.description: Bad Request

get.description: This Web service returns the general configuration of the institution.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Parameter for enhancing result with additional information. Currently supported: ingest_form

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_general.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_general.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General Error - An error has occurred while processing the request.'

get.description: This Web service returns a list of Integration Profiles.

parameters.description: Type for filtering. Optional. Valid values are from the IntegrationTypes code table

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Optional. Searching for words in created_by or name (see [Brief Search](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/How-we-re-building-APIs-at-Ex-Libris#BriefSearch))

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_integration_profile.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_integration_profile.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

40166410 - 'Parameter value invalid.'

40166404 - 'Invalid type.'

get.description:
This Web service returns a list of jobs that can be submitted.

The Jobs API supports 2 job types:

Manual jobs - Perform actions on a pre-defined set of records. Available in the Run a job list in the Alma UI.

Scheduled jobs  - Jobs that might be running periodically. In the Alma UI, it is possible to see these jobs (if they have a defined schedule) in the Scheduled tab of the Monitor Jobs page.

See [Working with the Alma Jobs API](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-Alma-Jobs-API) for more details.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: For filtering jobs by their category. Optional. For manual, possible values are from HPaTaskChain.type code table. For scheduled and other, possible values are from the systemJobsGroups code table. By default, all jobs will be retrieved.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: For filtering jobs by their type. Optional. Possible values are MANUAL/SCHEDULED/OTHER. If no type is given, all types of jobs will be retrieved.

parameters.name: profile_id
parameters.description: For filtering jobs by their profile ID. Optional. Relevant only for scheduled jobs.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_jobs.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_jobs.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

40166410 - 'Invalid category.'

40166410 - 'Invalid type.'

402219 - 'Failed to retrieve jobs list.'

get.description: This Web service returns job details for a given job id.

parameters.name: job_id
parameters.description: Unique id of the job. Mandatory.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_job.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_job.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402215 - 'Invalid job id format.'

402216 - 'Invalid job id.'

402249 - 'Invalid scheduled job category.'

post.description:
This Web service submits a job according to a given job id.

The Jobs API supports 2 job types:

Manual jobs - Perform actions on a pre-defined set of records. Available in the Run a job list in the Alma UI.

Scheduled jobs  - Jobs that might be running periodically. In the Alma UI, it is possible to see these jobs (if they have a defined schedule) in the Scheduled tab of the Monitor Jobs page.

In order to submit a manual job by API, the relevant parameters should be supplied in the input.

See [Working with the Alma Jobs API](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-Alma-Jobs-API) for more details.

 To maintain optimum performance the following threshold will be used: The job will run only if: 

 a. not more than 3 jobs initiated by the API are running currently. 

 b. not more of 5 of the specific job were started in the previous hour.

 The submission of scheduled jobs is supported for: ERP (Export Invoices, Import confirmation), Metadata Import, Remote Storage (Inventory Update, Send Requests to Remote Storage), Export/Import to Bursar,Finance (Funds Allocation Loader)General Publishing ('republish' action is currently not supported), Activate/Deactivate Courses and Student Information System (Import, Synchronize and Export).
post.summary: Submit a manual or scheduled job

parameters.name: job_id
parameters.description: Unique id of the job. Mandatory.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The operation to perform on the job. Currently op=run is supported for manual and scheduled jobs.

requestBody.description: This method takes a Job object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_job.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_job.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_job.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402215 - 'Invalid job id format.'

402216 - 'Invalid job id.'

402220 - 'Operation was not provided.'

402221 - 'Operation is not supported.'

402222/402223 - 'Execution threshold reached.'

402224/402225/402226 - 'An internal error occured.'

402228 - 'Mandatory parameter is missing from input.'

402229 - 'Mandatory parameter value is empty.'

402248 - 'Cannot submit scheduled job.'

402249 - 'Invalid scheduled job category.'

402231 - 'Job in consisted of more than one task - executing such job is currently not supported via the API.'

60347 - 'Job overlapps with running job - cannot execute.'

get.description: This Web service returns all the job instances (runs) for a given job id.

parameters.name: job_id
parameters.description: Unique id of the job. Mandatory.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: submit_date_from
parameters.description: Retrieve instances from this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: submit_date_to
parameters.description: Retrieve instances until this Date, included (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Only instances with the specified status will be retrieved. Optional.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_job_instances.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_job_instances.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402215 - 'Invalid job id format.'

402216 - 'Invalid job id.'

402217 - 'Invalid date format.'

40166410 - 'Invalid status.'

get.description: This Web service returns a job instance for given job id and instance id. [info!Note: It is possible to retrieve a job instance by using 'ALL' in place of a job id. ]

parameters.name: job_id
parameters.description: Unique id of the job. May be ALL to retrieve instance id for a job. Mandatory.

parameters.name: instance_id
parameters.description: Unique id of the specific job instance. Mandatory.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_job_instance.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_job_instance.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402215 - 'Invalid job id format.'

402216 - 'Invalid job id.'

402218 - 'Invalid job instance id.'

get.description: This Web service download a file which contains the loaded records of MARC MD import job instance for given job id and instance id, the file content can be XML/binary MARC records

parameters.name: job_id
parameters.description: Unique id of the job. May be ALL to retrieve instance id for a job. Mandatory.

parameters.name: instance_id
parameters.description: Unique id of the specific job instance. Mandatory.

parameters.name: download_format
parameters.description: MARC format XML/BINARY

parameters.name: line_type
parameters.description: Line Type as appears in /jobs/{job_id}/instances/{instance_id} api result

200.description: OK

400.description:
Bad Request

402215 - 'Invalid job id format.'

402216 - 'Invalid job id.'

402218 - 'Invalid job instance id.'

get.description: This Web service returns a list of events for a job-instance for the given job id and instance id.  For now it accepts jobs in the category and type of USERS/SIS and returns events only for rejected entries.

parameters.description: Unique id of the job. Mandatory.

parameters.name: instance_id
parameters.description: Unique id of the specific job instance. Mandatory.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_events.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_events.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402215 - 'Invalid job id format.'

402216 - 'Invalid job id.'

402218 - 'Invalid job instance id.'

60333 - 'Error retrieving events.'

60332 - 'This service will only work for the job category and type of USERS/SIS.'

get.description: This Web service returns single and multi match details for an import job.

parameters.name: job_id
parameters.description: Unique id of the job. Mandatory.

parameters.name: instance_id
parameters.description: Unique id of the specific job instance. Mandatory.

parameters.name: population
parameters.description: The population of match results to return. Valid values are SINGLE_MATCHES and MULTI_MATCHES. Mandatory.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_matches.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_matches.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402215 - 'Invalid job id format.'

402216 - 'Invalid job id.'

402218 - 'Invalid job instance id.'

402119 - 'General error.'

40166410 - 'Population value is invalid.'

get.description:
This API returns a list of open days and hours for a given library.

Note that the library-hours do not necessarily reflect when the library doors are actually open, but rather start and end times that effect loan period.

This API is limited to one month of days from 1 year ago to 3 years ahead for a single request.

parameters.name: libraryCode
parameters.description: The code for the institution from which the open hours should be retrieved.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: From this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: To this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to the From Date plus one week.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_open_days.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_open_days.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

get.description: This Web service returns a list of Import Profiles. In default mode, with no query parameters, all import profiles are returned.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The Import Profile Type. Optional. Default is no Import Type.

parameters.name: ie_type
parameters.description: The type of IE Entity created by this import. Optional. Default is to include all entities.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_import_profiles.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_import_profiles.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General Error - An error has occurred while processing the request.'

402123 - 'Invalid parameter value.'

get.description: This web service returns an Import profile given a Profile ID.

parameters.name: profile_id
parameters.description: The profile identifier.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_import_profile.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_import_profile.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401871 - 'Failed to find the Profile ID.'

post.description:
DEPRECATED - use the 'Submit Job' API instead.

 This web service runs an MD import according to a defined Import Profile. Supported for FTP, OAI and Digital.

parameters.name: profile_id
parameters.description: The profile identifier.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The operation to perform on the import profile. The operation op=run is supported.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_import_profile.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_import_profile.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401871 - 'Failed to find the Profile ID.'

get.description: This Web service returns a list of Sets.

parameters.name: content_type
parameters.description: Content type for filtering. Optional. Valid values are from the SetContentType code table

parameters.name: set_type
parameters.description: Set type for filtering. Optional. Valid values are 'ITEMIZED' or 'LOGICAL'.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Optional. Searching for words in created_by or name (see [Brief Search](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/How-we-re-building-APIs-at-Ex-Libris#BriefSearch))

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: set_origin
parameters.description: Set origin for filtering. Optional. Valid values are 'UI' or 'UI_CZ'.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_sets.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_sets.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

40166410 - 'Parameter value invalid.'

60106 - 'Invalid query format.'

60107 - 'Invalid set ID.'

post.description:
Web service for creating or combining a set.

If you are creating a new set, you can use this API to create 2 types of sets: Itemized set, Logical set

In order to create an itemized set, first create an empty set using this API, and then use the [Manage Members](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis/docs/conf/UE9TVCAvYWxtYXdzL3YxL2NvbmYvc2V0cy97c2V0X2lkfQ==/) API to populate it.

Creating logical sets is supported for Inventory related entities, Users and Vendors (not supported for PO-Lines, etc).

 Details regarding the syntax for creating Logical Sets can be found [here](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/integrations/indexdoc-technical).

In addtion, it is possible to create an itemized set and populate it from a logical set by setting the logical set id in the from_logical_set parameter.

It is also possible to create an itemized Bib record set which is based on MD Import job by providing job instance id and population.

For more details about MD import based itemized set [see here](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Creating-sets-from-MD-import-job-results-using-Alma-API).

If you are combining sets, then set1 and set2 must be provided. Those two sets will be combined with a new combined set created.

parameters.name: population
parameters.description: The population on which a set should be created. Optional.

parameters.name: job_instance_id
parameters.description: The id of MD Import Job instance from which a set should be created. Supported for sets of Bib records. Optional.

parameters.name: from_logical_set
parameters.description: An id of a logical set to create an Itemized Set based on it. Optional.

parameters.name: combine
parameters.description: The logical operator. Choose between AND, OR, NOT. Default is AND. Optional

parameters.name: set1
parameters.description: The primary combining set. Optional.

parameters.name: set2
parameters.description: The secondary combining set. Optional.

parameters.name: nz_set_from_iz_set
parameters.description: An id of an Institution Zone set which will be used as a base to create a set in the Network Zone. The new set will include the Network Zone records to which the Institution Zone records are linked. Optional.

parameters.name: filter_set
parameters.description: An id of a set to create a new filtered set based on it, according to the indication_rule parameter. Optional.

parameters.name: indication_rule
parameters.description: The name of the Indication Rule to be used to filter the set defined in filter_set. Relevant if filter_set is used.

requestBody.description: This method takes a Set object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_set.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_set.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_set.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General Error - An error has occurred while processing the request.'

500127 - ''job_instance_id' and 'population' must be provided together.'

402262 - 'Set type is invalid. Only 'ITEMIZED' and 'LOGICAL' sets are supported.'

402263 - 'The set name already exists. Please choose a different name.'

402264 - 'Set ID is invalid.'

402265 - 'Failed to create a set.'

402266 - 'Population value is invalid.'

402267 - 'Job instance type for the provided job_instance_id is not MD_IMPORT - the operation is not supported.'

60204 - 'Set combine operator not valid.'

60205 - 'Combining sets are not the same type.'

60206 - 'Sets combine operation failed.'

60209 - 'Set private value not valid.'

60210 - 'Set status not valid.'

60311 - 'Combining sets are not the same origin.'

402218 - 'Invalid job instance id.'

60334 - 'Failed to create a set in Network.'

60335 - 'The From Institution Zone is not allowed for institution not in Network.'

60107 - 'The set ID provided for the Institution Zone set is not valid.'

60336 - 'The set type is not allowed for creation as network set.'

post.description: This Web service manages the operations of add, delete and replace for members of a Set given a Set ID.

parameters.name: set_id
parameters.description: Unique id of the set. Mandatory.

parameters.name: id_type
parameters.description:
The type of the identifier that is used to identify members. Optional. 

For physical items: BARCODE. 

For Bib records: SYSTEM_NUMBER, OCLC_NUMBER, ISBN, ISSN. For regular MMS-IDs no need to defined this parameter. 

For users: any type that is defined in UserIdentifierTypes Code Table

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The operation to perform on the set. Mandatory. The supported operations are add_members, delete_members or replace_members.

parameters.name: fail_on_invalid_id
parameters.description: If false, the API will ignore invalid IDs. Relevant for sets of Bibs, Items and Users.

requestBody.description: This method takes a Set object including list of members to add/remove. Up to 1000 members can be supplied. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_set.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_set.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_set.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

60107 - 'Invalid set ID.'

60111 - 'Invalid operation.'

60112 - 'Invalid set type.'

60113 - 'Input set with no members.'

60114 - 'Input set with no member ID.'

60115 - 'A member ID is already in the set.'

60116 - 'A member ID is not valid for the content.'

60117 - 'Input set member ID is not in set.'

60118 - 'Input set member list exceeds limit.'

60119 - 'Input set with duplicate member.'

60120 - 'A member ID is not valid for the content and identifier.'

60176 - 'A member ID which is represented by an id_type identifier is already in the set.'

40166410 - 'Invalid parameter identifier type.'

get.description: This API returns a fine and fee report.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of fees not transactions. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: transaction_from_date
parameters.description: From this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

parameters.name: transaction_to_date
parameters.description: To this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to from date. Limit of 7 days period.

parameters.name: transaction_type
parameters.description: Add fine fee transaction type filter.  This defaults to both payment and waived.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Add fine owner filter.  This is a library or the institution code.

parameters.name: received_by_circ_library
parameters.description: Add circulation library filter. May be used in conjunction with received_by_circ_desk to filter results.

parameters.name: received_by_circ_desk
parameters.description: Add circulation desk filter. Must be used in conjunction with received_by_circ_library to filter results.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fees.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fees.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

40166411 - 'An error has occurred in setting from and/or to dates.'

40166419 - 'An error has occurred in setting transaction type.'

40166410 - 'An error has occurred in setting circ library or circ desk.'

post.description:
Triggers the execution of a LibOW workflow using the provided workflow ID.

The request JSON body is forwarded as the REST trigger payload to the workflow's Alma Trigger node.

For production mode, the workflow must be active and must include an Alma Trigger node with 'Execute via REST API' selected.

For test mode, use test=true to execute while the trigger node is listening and accepting requests. Note that the workflow must be saved/persisted.

parameters.name: workflow_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the workflow.

parameters.name: test
parameters.description: If true, executes workflow in test mode.

200.description: OK

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

450001 - 'Workflow not found.'

450002 - 'Workflow inactive.'

450003 - 'Workflow missing trigger node.'

450004 - 'Workflow missing trigger configuration.  In test mode, this could mean the node is not listening for events.'

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key used to authorize requests. Learn about how to create API keys at [Alma REST APIs](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis/#defining)

remaining.description: The number of remaining calls according to the [Governance Threshold](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis/#threshold)
